app._debug_modules_comment: List of module namespaces to enable DEBUG logging (supports wildcards: 'modules.player.*', 'modules.api.artnet')
app._log_level_comment: Log levels: DEBUG, INFO, WARNING, ERROR, CRITICAL
app._max_log_files_comment: Maximum number of log files to keep (0 = infinite, keep all logs)

gpu._force_gpu_path_comment: Set true to bypass the readback speed probe and force GPU shaders regardless of hardware (for shader testing on slow-readback GPUs like AMD). Do NOT use in production.

effects._comment: Default effect chains. video/artnet: arrays of effect configs. clips: array of effects applied to ALL clips
effects._transport_position_update_interval_comm: Send transport position WebSocket updates every N frames (lower = more updates, higher = less network traffic)

frontend._debug_logging_comment: Enable/disable console.log debug output in browser console (true/false). Use window.toggleDebug() to enable at runtime.
frontend._verbose_logging_comment: Extra verbose logging for development (even noisier than debug_logging)

outputs._info: These are the available outputs. Actual routing is in session_state.json

definitions.description: Virtual output for web preview streaming

performance._comment: Performance monitoring and optimization. profiling_enabled: enable performance profiler (set to false in production for zero overhead). enable_loop_cache: cache decoded frames for short loops. enable_rgb_cache: cache pre-computed RGB frames. enable_gpu: use GPU (OpenCL) for resize/warp operations (set false to force CPU).
performance._eager_load_threshold_mb_comment: Clips smaller than this (MB) are eagerly copied into heap RAM at load time — zero page-fault stalls during playback. Larger clips stay memory-mapped (OS pages on demand). Raise for smoother large-clip playback if you have enough RAM; lower to conserve RAM.

video._preview_fps_limit_comment: FPS limit for preview players (null = use source FPS, number = limit to specific FPS)

player_resolution._autosize_comment: Options: off, stretch, fill, fit. How to handle videos that don't match resolution

preview_stream._comment: MJPEG stream settings. fps: 25-60 recommended. preview_width/preview_height: GPU downscale target (0=off). jpeg_quality: 1-100

fullscreen._comment: Fullscreen stream settings. preview_width=0 disables GPU downscale (uses full canvas resolution)

websocket._comment: WebSocket command channels for low-latency control. Video preview uses MJPEG.

commands._debounce_ms_comment: Debounce delay for parameter updates in milliseconds (lower = more responsive, higher = less network traffic)
commands._enabled_comment: Enable WebSocket command channels for low-latency control (play/pause/effects/layers)
commands._reconnect_attempts_comment: Number of reconnection attempts if WebSocket connection drops
commands._timeout_ms_comment: WebSocket command timeout before falling back to REST API (milliseconds)
